Hero.subtitle: Smart farming tools, live Mandi prices, and weather updates built to help Indian farmers grow more and earn more.

Features.heading: Tools for a better harvest.
Features.subheading: Stop guessing. Grow with confidence using our easy-to-use farming tools made for Indian agriculture.

cropIntel.title: Smart Crop Guide
cropIntel.desc: Find out the best time to sow and harvest based on your local soil and weather.

sellPredictor.title: Best Time to Sell
sellPredictor.desc: Find the right time to sell your crops for maximum profit.

voiceAssistant.title: KrishiSarthi Voice AI
voiceAssistant.desc: Speak in your local language to get instant farming advice and weather updates.

diseaseVision.title: Crop Disease Scanner
diseaseVision.desc: Take a photo of a sick plant. Instantly find out the disease and how to treat it.

microClimate.title: 7-Day Local Weather
microClimate.desc: Get accurate 7-day weather forecasts for your exact farm location.

mandiRates.title: Live Mandi Prices
mandiRates.desc: Check daily, live APMC Mandi prices for your crops across India.

community.title: Farmer Community
community.desc: Connect with other farmers. Ask questions, share advice, and help each other.

schemes.title: Govt. Schemes Locator
schemes.desc: Easily find government subsidies and farming schemes you are eligible for.

yieldAnalytics.title: Harvest Tracker
yieldAnalytics.desc: Track your past harvests to plan better for the next season.

soilIntelligence.title: Soil Intelligence Labs
soilIntelligence.desc: Locate certified soil testing soil labs nearby and get personalized crop recommendations.

TrustSection.description: From live Mandi prices and daily SMS alerts to renting tractors locally, KrishiMitra puts farming tools right in your phone.
TrustSection.list1: Live APMC Mandi prices with local SMS alerts
TrustSection.list2: Rent local tractors, equipment, and farm labor
TrustSection.list3: Smart farming advisor & verified government schemes

Footer.smsDesc: Subscribe to get local market updates. Never miss the right price for your harvest.
Footer.smsDisclaimer: Standard SMS rates may apply. Cancel anytime.
Footer.brandDesc: Helping Indian farmers grow better with smart advice, live market prices, and simple farming tools.

mandi.title: Local Mandi Prices
mandi.noData: No live market data available right now.

aiAssistant.title: Krishi Advisor
aiAssistant.monitoring: We are keeping an eye on your local weather to keep your crops safe.
aiAssistant.fungalWarningDesc: Humidity is currently {humidity}. Wait before applying urea and check lower leaves for any disease.
aiAssistant.optimalDesc: The current weather is safe for your crops. You can water your fields as normal.

WeatherIntelligence.title: Local Weather Updates
WeatherIntelligence.subtitle: Live weather details and advice to protect your farm and crops.
WeatherIntelligence.stableConditions: Weather is normal. No special action is needed today.

recs.delayIrrigationDesc: High chance of rain expected in the next 48 hours. Wait before watering your fields to stop them from flooding.
recs.irrigationOpenDesc: No heavy rain expected soon. It is safe to water your crops as usual.
recs.poorSprayDesc: Winds are blowing too fast right now ({windSpeed} km/h). Spraying chemicals now will blow them away from your crops.
recs.optimalSprayDesc: Low wind and no rain today make it a perfect time to spray fertilizers or pesticides.
recs.fungalRiskDesc: Warm weather and {humidity}% humidity is bad for crops. Check leaves closely for any signs of disease.

CommunityForum.title: Farmer Community
CommunityForum.subtitle: Connect with other farmers. Ask questions, share advice, and grow together.
CommunityForum.searchPlaceholder: Search questions by crop or topic...
CommunityForum.noPosts: No discussions found. Be the first to ask a question!
CommunityForum.noReplies: No replies yet. Help this farmer out!
CommunityForum.sellAlone: Selling Alone: You pay high transport costs and have to accept whatever price the trader gives you.
CommunityForum.sellTogether: Selling Together: Bring large amounts of crops to Mandi. Traders compete to buy, getting you a higher price.
CommunityForum.noData: Not enough posts to show popular topics yet.
CommunityForum.beFirst: Be the first to ask a question!

journey.heroTitle: Create your land profile. Get instant soil insights.
journey.heroSubtitle: Step 1: land profile. Step 2: soil values (manual or kit). Step 3: add health card. Step 4: get report.
journey.startDesc: We will guide you step by step. You can edit anytime.

landFirst.title: Land-first profile
landFirst.desc: Diagnose the exact field you choose.

easyEntry.title: Easy values entry
easyEntry.desc: Type numbers or read from photo.

statusCard.title: Land profile status
statusCard.subtitle: Track where you are and what to do next.
statusCard.retestStarted: Retest started. Please add new pH + moisture values.
statusCard.retestFailed: Could not start retest. Try again.

actions.kit-pending: Start your soil test or order a kit.
actions.kit-ordered: Your kit is on the way. Track delivery or prepare the test.
actions.values-captured: You can upload a health card or move to report.
actions.card-pending: Upload the soil health card if available.
actions.completed: View or update your report anytime.
actions.retest: Your soil test is old. Take a fresh pH + moisture reading.

step1.title: Land details
step1.subtitle: Fill details of the land you want to check.
step1.hint: Add land name and location to continue.

errors.required: Please add your land name, state, and district to continue.

step2.title: Add pH + moisture
step2.subtitle: Use numbers you have, or order a kit.
step2.hint: Enter pH + moisture or use the kit.

manual.label: Manual entry
manual.title: Enter pH + moisture
manual.subtitle: Quick entry in under a minute.
manual.help: We only need pH and moisture.

errors.required: Add pH and moisture before saving.

kit.label: Kit path
kit.title: Order a strip kit
kit.subtitle: We deliver in 3-5 days.
kit.orderItemDesc: Everything you need to read pH + moisture.
kit.shippingHelp: Add your address to unlock shipping.
kit.trackingHelp: We update your delivery status automatically.

errors.formInvalid: Please complete all required address fields.
errors.name: Please enter the farmer name.

kit.help: Best when you do not have numbers.
kit.readHelp: We only read pH and moisture.
kit.deliveryDesc: We need your address for the kit.
kit.altHelp: You can still enter values manually.

step3.title: Soil Health Card
step3.subtitle: Upload the card if you have it.
step3.hint: Upload card or skip for now.

step4.title: Final report
step4.subtitle: We combine land details and soil values.
step4.generateHelp: We will use this for crop advice.

insights.phLow: Soil is acidic. Add lime and organic compost.
insights.phHigh: Soil is alkaline. Add gypsum and organic manure.
insights.nLow: Nitrogen is low. Apply urea/compost in split doses.
insights.pLow: Phosphorus is low. Use SSP/DAP at sowing.
insights.kLow: Potassium is low. Apply MOP or potash mix.
insights.ocLow: Organic carbon is low. Add FYM, green manure.
insights.ecHigh: EC is high. Check salinity and irrigation quality.
insights.missing: Add missing values for more specific advice.

messages.ocrDone: OCR done. Please check the values.

report.analysisComplete: AI analysis is completed. Review the metrics below.
